Argument Reference

The following arguments are supported:

  • annotation_format - (Required) The annotation format name required for labeling records.
  • compartment_id - (Required) The compartment identifier for the dataset.
  • dataset_format_details - (Required) Dataset format details supplied during dataset creation.
  • dataset_source_details - (Required) Dataset source details supplied during dataset creation.
  • label_set - (Required) Label set definition supplied during dataset creation.
  • defined_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Defined tags for this dataset.
  • description - (Optional) (Updatable) A user provided description of the dataset.
  • display_name - (Optional) (Updatable) A user-friendly display name for the dataset.
  • freeform_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Freeform tags for this dataset.
  • labeling_instructions - (Optional) (Updatable) Rich-text instructions shown to human labelers.
  • initial_import_dataset_configuration - (Optional) Initial import configuration applied only during creation.
  • initial_record_generation_configuration - (Optional) Initial record generation configuration applied only during creation.
